questions.question: Because there is no GPT-5.3 Thinking model, which model does the card say is the main baseline for GPT-5.4 Thinking?
expected_citation_text_contains: there is not a model named GPT-5.3 Thinking
the main model to baseline against is GPT-5.2 Thinking

questions.question: GPT-5.4 Thinking is the first general purpose model to implement mitigations for what capability area?
expected_citation_text_contains: the first general purpose model to have implemented mitigations for High capability in Cybersecurity

questions.question: Which three domains are covered by the dynamic multi-turn evaluations described in the card?
What combined Cyber Range pass rate does the card report for GPT-5.4 Thinking?
Under the Preparedness Framework, which domain does the card say GPT-5.4 Thinking does not have a plausible chance of reaching a High threshold in?
expected_citation_text_contains: does not have a plausible chance of reaching a High threshold

questions.question: What does the card say about releasing GPT-5.4 Thinking weights under Apache 2.0?
